title: Quieter Phantom
description: Lowers the volume of Phantom noises — notably their loud screeches.
body:
# Introduction

Don't mind Phantoms in your world? Tired of their ear-piercing volume? No worries! This Resource Pack solves that by lowering the volume of all Phantom sounds while allowing players to hear them.

# Information
✅ Tested to ensure that Phantom noises are not intrusive to the player's experience. ✅

⚠️ **Free to use in Modpacks when credited.** ⚠️

✨ Interested in more? Here's my [visual redesign](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/deep-dark-phantom) of the Phantom! ✨

## Video Example
